summary: Audience recording captures a high‑energy Fox show with an unforgettable, dancing balcony crowd
review: The lone review praises the concert’s electric atmosphere – a packed balcony that literally made the floor shake as fans danced. While no specific audio details are given, the .aud. source suggests a typical audience tape that conveys the excitement of the night.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review focusing on crowd energy; no technical audio feedback, so rating leans heavily on show excitement with modest assumption about recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; presumed standard audience tape quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review highlights a wildly enthusiastic balcony crowd and overall great vibe, but gives no details on song flow.
